bulkParkGraphUpserts.title: Bulk park JSON upserts
bulkParkGraphUpserts.subtitle: Filter parks, choose the properties to export, then import the JSON again to apply bulk updates to present properties.

export.title: Configured JSON export
export.description: The id, name, and countryCode fields are always present. Checked sections add their properties, even when they are empty or null.

sections.title: Exported properties
sections.identityIncluded: With no checked section, the export only contains the filtered parks' minimal identity.

import.title: Bulk JSON import
import.description: Bulk mode is reserved for updates to existing parks. Detected creations block the preview.
import.placeholder: Drop or paste a bulk JSON export here.

errors.fileReadFailed: The JSON file could not be read.

toasts.exportFailedDetail: The bulk JSON could not be prepared.
toasts.previewSuccessDetail: The bulk JSON can be applied.
toasts.previewFailedDetail: The bulk preview could not complete.
toasts.applyPartialDetail: Some entries were not applied. Check the details.
toasts.applyRejectedDetail: {{count}} entry or entries were rejected. Check the details.
toasts.applyFailedDetail: The bulk JSON could not be applied.
toasts.errorsCopiedDetail: The details are in the clipboard.
toasts.copyFailedDetail: The details could not be copied.

result.title: Bulk preview
result.pending: Run a preview to inspect changes before applying.
result.appliedPartial: Partial apply: {{applied}} entry or entries applied, {{failed}} rejected.

shortcuts.bulkParkGraphUpserts: Export and import configured bulk JSON files.
